stories.headline: Kimi K3 Triggers a Second DeepSeek Shock as Chip Stocks Slide Worldwide
stories.key_takeaway: Moonshot's open-weight Kimi K3 helped trigger a global chip selloff that hit Asia far harder than the January 2025 DeepSeek shock but spared Nvidia its worst, signaling markets are repricing the entire AI supply chain rather than one chipmaker.

pull_quote.text: This does not prove the scaling law has failed, but rather shows scaling is no longer the only winning path.
pull_quote.role: Partner and Head of Equities, Goldman Sachs

data_points.label: Nvidia decline, briefly ceding top market cap to Apple
Nvidia value lost in the Jan 2025 DeepSeek shock

stories.article_excerpt: Eighteen months ago, a Chinese lab called DeepSeek erased roughly $590 billion of Nvidia's market value in a single session.

stories.headline: Fireworks Raises $1.5 Billion at a $17.5 Billion Valuation as Inference Demand Explodes
stories.key_takeaway: Fireworks raised $1.505 billion at a $17.5 billion valuation on a bet that enterprises will build specialized intelligence on open models rather than rent frontier ones — a thesis validated the same week Moonshot's Kimi K3 pushed open-weight models to frontier level.

pull_quote.text: There are two paths forward for AI. In one, intelligence belongs to a few big labs, and everyone else rents it. In the other, every company in the world builds specialized intelligence of its own, shaped by the domain only it understands. We are building towards the second.

data_points.label: Annualized revenue run rate, up 5x YoY

stories.article_excerpt: The pitch used to be simple: rent your intelligence from a big lab. On Thursday, a San Mateo startup rewrote it.

stories.headline: Meta and Anthropic Discuss a $10 Billion Compute Lease
stories.key_takeaway: Meta is in early, unconfirmed talks to lease Anthropic up to $10 billion of data center compute over two years, a deal that would make Meta a cloud landlord to its own AI rival.

pull_quote.text: Companies regularly ask if we have compute they could buy from us at some premium.

data_points.label: Potential deal value over two years
Anthropic's monthly payment to SpaceX for Colossus

stories.article_excerpt: For years, Meta's data centers have been a cost center. A reported approach from Anthropic could turn them into a business.

stories.headline: Anthropic's $47B Run-Rate Overtakes OpenAI — But Read the Footnotes
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic's self-reported $47B run-rate does exceed OpenAI's ~$25B, but both are unaudited annualized projections, the widely-cited 'OpenAI $25-33B' conflates a run-rate with a projected loss, and OpenAI disputes the comparison as inflated.

pull_quote.text: It's a really big upfront cost to train the models and to serve inference on them.

data_points.label: OpenAI annualized run-rate, per The Information
Anthropic valuation in its Series H round

stories.article_excerpt: On paper, the AI industry's biggest upset is settled: Anthropic has passed OpenAI on revenue. Then read the footnotes.

stories.headline: Moonshot's Kimi K3 Is the Largest Open-Weight Model Ever — and It Rivals US Frontier Systems
stories.key_takeaway: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3, a 2.8-trillion-parameter sparse MoE model, is the largest open-weight model ever built and now matches US frontier systems on independent leaderboards, with full weights promised by July 27.

pull_quote.text: Convergence of reasoning capabilities at the frontier is directionally negative for AI model lab terminal margins.

stories.article_excerpt: Sometime on the evening of July 16, with no keynote and not even a public model card, Moonshot AI flipped the switch.

stories.headline: Google Delays Gemini 3.5 Pro by Months After It Missed Internal Coding Targets
stories.key_takeaway: Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro is months behind its June target after coding and long-horizon reasoning fell short of internal goals, per Bloomberg, denting Alphabet's stock and exposing pressure in the AI race's most contested capability.

pull_quote.text: We're shipping quickly across a wide range of models while keeping them highly cost-effective for customers.

data_points.label: Alphabet intraday share drop after report
Market value erased as shares closed down ~4.4%
Current and former employees cited by Bloomberg
Kimi K3's chart-topping Frontend Code Arena score

stories.article_excerpt: Google's most powerful next-generation model was supposed to be in developers' hands by now. It isn't.

stories.headline: Xi Launches a 29-Nation AI Governance Body as China Pitches an Alternative to the West
stories.key_takeaway: China launched WAICO, a 29-nation Shanghai-based AI governance body courting the Global South as an alternative to US export controls and the EU AI Act, with the US notably absent.

pull_quote.text: AI development should not be a solo performance by a single country, but a symphony of international cooperation.

data_points.label: AI training slots pledged for developing countries

stories.article_excerpt: Xi Jinping walked onto the Shanghai Expo Center stage on Friday and, for the first time in eight years, keynoted WAIC.

stories.headline: The FTC Wants to Treat 'Steered' AI Answers as Deceptive — and Override State Laws
stories.key_takeaway: The FTC's proposed policy statement declares that quietly steering an AI system toward undisclosed objectives can be a deceptive act under Section 5 — and that complying with state AI laws is no defense, setting up a federal-vs-state preemption fight.

pull_quote.text: State law that requires an AI firm to deceive its consumers obviously conflicts with [FTC Act] Section 5's express purpose of protecting consumers from such conduct.

stories.article_excerpt: The FTC has decided that the way an AI system answers you is not just a product feature — it can be a legal violation.

stories.headline: Wonder Raises $650 Million at a $9 Billion Valuation, Betting Robotics and AI Can Reshape Food Delivery Before an IPO
stories.key_takeaway: Marc Lore's Wonder raised more than $650 million at a $9 billion valuation to fund national expansion, robotics and an aspirational AI meal-planning platform ahead of a planned early-2027 IPO, even as investor documents show heavy projected cash burn.

pull_quote.text: We believe Wonder's technology-forward platform is redefining the economics and experience of restaurant-quality food at scale.
pull_quote.role: Founder, CEO and CIO, ARK Invest

stories.article_excerpt: Marc Lore wants to be ready to ring the opening bell. On Thursday, his food venture raised more than half a billion dollars.
